name: FPV Worldwide
short_description: Dive into our FPV drone simulator on Steam, featuring stunning global visuals with Unreal Engine 5. Share and discover spots, control the weather, use real drone controllers, and teleport anywhere. Perfect for drone enthusiasts.
detailed_description: Dive into a unique FPV drone simulator on Steam, where every corner of the globe is yours to explore without the limitations of laws, battery life, or drone range. Rendered in stunning detail with Unreal Engine 5, this simulator lets you share favorite spots with a community of enthusiasts, perfect for freestyle or cinematic flights. Adjust the weather, use your own controllers for an authentic feel, and stabilize your camera for smooth footage. Search and teleport anywhere worldwide for an unmatched flying experience. Perfect for hobbyists and pros alike.
about_the_game: Dive into a unique FPV drone simulator on Steam, where every corner of the globe is yours to explore without the limitations of laws, battery life, or drone range. supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Czech, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
